text.message: bro, why do you keep robbing me?  when blue has a city
I need that spot and you didn’t say where when I asked?
it wasn't clear what you were asking
you‘re not gonna go for 3:1 on 9?
blue is running away with it
i dont think blue has a knight
if you take road you could be at 8
blue has shown he has 2 vps
why prefer red with road over me?  he has open settles, i have none left
i think the table wants me with road
red and I have the same base points, but my path to victory is harder, him with road is worse for the table
blue will win while we fight fir road
now you get soloed blue bad play
and yall let black get army well done
this means he has the win
i have a VP and YOP
i still have to build two cities to win
where is the integrity these days
red has ore for you to port
and is at 9 pts with open settle
that was a great spot what?
they gave you the win I gess
i mean you blocked my 8 blue
i told you, blue had army locked
that was all my ore black
i think you got to wait for the 8 ore
black you should have go e for army
i tried, I pulled two monos and a yop
